seoTitle: Murrumujuk vs Nakara — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Murrumujuk and Nakara. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Murrumujuk and Nakara.
heading: Murrumujuk vs Nakara — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Murrumujuk, Northern Territory and Nakara, Northern Territory. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Murrumujuk has a lower overall climate risk score (26/100) compared to Nakara (32/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Murrumujuk or Nakara safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Murrumujuk has a flood risk score of 33/100, while Nakara scores 55/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Murrumujuk scores 16/100 for bushfire risk. Nakara scores 27/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Murrumujuk or Nakara?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Murrumujuk has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.22% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
